title: Renting an Apartment 租房看房

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: Hi, I saw your listing online. Is this apartment still available?
lines.cn: 你好，我在网上看到你们的房源。这间公寓还出租吗？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: Yes, it is. It has one bedroom, one living room, and a nice kitchen. Would you like to take a look?
lines.cn: 是的，还在。它有一间卧室、一间客厅和一个不错的厨房。你想看看吗？

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: Sure. How much is the rent per month?

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: The rent is eight hundred and fifty dollars a month, including water and gas. But electricity is not included.
lines.cn: 月租850美元，包含水费和燃气费。但不包含电费。

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: That sounds reasonable. Can I see the bathroom?
lines.cn: 听起来合理。我可以看看浴室吗？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: Of course. It is right here. The shower works very well, and there is a washing machine in the corner.
lines.cn: 当然可以。就在这儿。淋浴很好用，角落里还有一台洗衣机。

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: I like it. Is the neighborhood safe and quiet at night?
lines.cn: 我喜欢。这个社区晚上安全安静吗？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: Yes, it is very safe. There is a park nearby and a supermarket just two blocks away.
lines.cn: 是的，非常安全。附近有个公园，超市离这儿只有两个街区。

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: Great. When can I move in?
lines.cn: 太好了。我什么时候可以搬进来？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: You can move in anytime after the first of next month. Let me know if you want to sign the lease today.
lines.cn: 下个月一号之后随时都可以。如果你今天想签租约，请告诉我。
